name: White Asparagus in Ham Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup reserved cooking liquid from asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the asparagus and reserve 1/2 cup of the cooking liquid.
2. Heat the butter in a saucepan over low heat.
3. Gradually add the flour to the butter, stirring until smooth.
4. Slowly pour in the reserved cooking liquid and milk, continuously stirring.
5. Cook the mixture on low heat, stirring constantly, until it thickens and bubbles.
6. Stir in the ham, nutmeg, and salt.
7. Gently fold in the asparagus.
8. Heat through without boiling. Serve in a preheated serving dish.
